caption: A video call interface shows a presentation screen alongside a small video feed of a man wearing a blue hat and a dark shirt. The presentation screen features a black background with green text that reads, "A clear insight Compressed in time Presented in a manner that allows the audience to discover it themselves," followed by a dashed line and the text, "The Power of Moments Heath Brothers." The browser window at the top displays multiple open tabs, including one titled "Rural Community Food System." Across the sequence, the visual content remains static; the man in the video feed remains in the same position and expression, and the text on the presentation slide does not change. The only slight variations are minimal shifts in the man's posture and lighting within his video frame, while the overall layout of the screen-sharing session persists throughout.
